summary: Single proposal looks reasonable with one specific concern about taker buy ratio threshold sensitivity in funding-neutral regimes.

concerns: Funding-neutral window [-0.0001, 0.0001] is very narrow — at typical 5m sampling, instantaneous funding rarely sits exactly in this band during an active OI pump (+10%) since aggressive long taker buying usually pushes funding positive within minutes. Risk: trigger count may be very low and concentrated in transition moments, which could be a feature (catches early phase) or fragility (sample size too small to validate).
critiques.monitoring_advice: Track trigger count vs E126 baseline; if trig<500 over 30d, flag as too rare. Also log the funding trajectory in the 5m AFTER trigger — if funding rapidly skews positive post-entry, the 'organic' premise holds; if it stays neutral, may indicate weak conviction move that fails to follow through.
